tasks.title: Review poetry parser implementation
tasks.description: The StanzaParser.ts exists and can identify verse structure, count syllables, detect meter. Review its capabilities and consider: 1) What poetry could be parsed with it? 2) Could it be extended for other verse forms? 3) Is there value in integrating it with other systems?
notes:
2026-03-06T09:15:29.929Z: ANALYSIS COMPLETE

Current Capabilities:
- Stanza detection via blank lines
- Syllable counting (vowel groups)
- Meter classification: verse (~10 syl), prose (>15), mixed
- Indentation consistency checking

Extensions Possible:
1. Rhyme detection (end-word phonetic matching)
2. Stress pattern analysis (iambic/trochaic/etc)
3. Form recognition (sonnet, haiku, villanelle)
4. Sound devices (alliteration, assonance)
5. Enjambment detection

Integration Ideas:
- Analyze session outputs for poetic qualities
- Generate commit-message poetry
- Structure reflections as verse
- Parse external literary works

Verdict: Lightweight but extensible. Good foundation.

Completed: Task completed: Analyzed StanzaParser.ts capabilities, identified 5 extension paths, documented integration possibilities. Poetry system is lightweight but functional foundation for future verse-related features.
